connect.intro: Connect to your vault server to get started.

errors.invalidUrl: Enter the full server URL, including http:// or https://
errors.notVaultctl: {{server}} doesn't look like a vaultctl server.
errors.serverUnhealthy: The server is reachable but reporting a problem. You may not be able to sign in until it recovers.

errors.masterPasswordChanged: Master password changed - sign in once to re-enable Touch ID
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts - wait a few minutes and try again

vault.noVaults: No vaults on this account yet - create one in the web vault.

generator.empty: Generated passwords you copy or fill appear here.

send.title: Send isn't available yet
send.body: Ephemeral encrypted sharing needs server support that vaultctl doesn't have yet. It'll show up here once the backend lands.

notifications.title: No notifications
notifications.body: When the extension catches a login you haven't saved yet, it shows up here. Nothing to review right now.
notifications.saveError: Could not save this login to the vault

update.autoUpdateNote: You're on v{{current}}. Your browser updates the extension automatically.
update.heading: Updates
update.checkingOff: Update checking is off on this server.
update.cardLine: <version>v{{version}}</version> is available - you're on v{{current}}. Your browser updates the extension automatically.
update.cardLineSeverity: <version>v{{version}}</version> is available ({{severity}}) - you're on v{{current}}. Your browser updates the extension automatically.

settings.fieldIconHint: Inline icon inside login fields to fill
settings.autofillHint: Fill matching logins automatically, no click
settings.suggestPasswordHint: Offer a generated password on signup fields
settings.promptTimeoutHint: How long the save/update prompt stays before it fades
settings.autoLockHint: Lock after this much inactivity. Closing the browser always locks.
settings.updateAlertsHint: When a newer vaultctl release raises a notice in Alerts
settings.neverSaveHint: vaultctl won't offer to save or update logins here.
settings.biometricEnrolledHint: Stored behind your device biometric on this browser.
settings.biometricSetupHint: Skip the master password on this device after one sign-in.

biometricErrors.missingFields: Enter your email and master password
biometricErrors.rateLimited: Too many attempts - try again later

about.tagline: Zero-knowledge password vault. Encryption keys never leave this device.
